titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5959

div.p: To all who shall view or hear these letters, H(erbert) abbot of Kelso, and L(aurence) and H(ugh), archdeacons of the dioceses of St Andrews and Glasgow, send greeting. The mandate of the lord pope have we received in these words: 'Gregory the bishop, servant of the servants of God, to his well-beloved sons, the abbot of Kelso in St Andrews diocese, and of Glasgow and St Andrews, Hugh and Laurence the archdeacons, greeting and apostolic blessing. Thomas the knight and J(uliana) his wife having come to us have demonstrated that the priors of Durham and of Coldingham and their communities, and certain other clergy of the dioceses of St Andrews and Durham are committing an injustice against the same in respect of lands, possessions, and other things. Therefore we command your judgment by apostolic writing, so that with the parties assembled you hear the case and conclude it
